data.cta_english: Is this the greatest World Cup match ever? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: Ten goals exploded in a single World Cup match, but nobody predicted this dramatic thriller.
segments.image_query: dramatic football stadium crowd night lights atmosphere
segments.subtitle_english: 10 goals exploded in a single World Cup match, but nobody predicted this dramatic thriller.
segments.voice_hindi: विश्व कप के एक ही मैच में दस गोल हुए, लेकिन किसी ने भी इस नाटकीय रोमांच की भविष्यवाणी नहीं की थी।

segments.voice_english: In that insane match, England scored six huge goals because France made defensive mistakes.
segments.subtitle_english: In that insane match, England scored 6 huge goals because France made defensive mistakes.
segments.voice_hindi: उस रोमांचक मैच में, इंग्लैंड ने छह बड़े गोल किए क्योंकि फ्रांस ने रक्षात्मक गलतियाँ कीं।

segments.voice_english: But France refused to lose easily, so they hit back with four fast goals.
segments.subtitle_english: But France refused to lose easily, so they hit back with 4 fast goals.
segments.voice_hindi: लेकिन फ़्रांस ने आसानी से हारने से इनकार कर दिया, इसलिए उन्होंने चार तेज़ गोल करके जवाबी हमला किया।

segments.voice_english: After those ten crazy goals landed, fans watched in total shock at the stadium.
segments.image_query: shocked football fans in stadium crowd cheering dramatic
segments.subtitle_english: After those 10 crazy goals landed, fans watched in total shock at the stadium.
segments.voice_hindi: उन दस पागल गोलों के बाद, स्टेडियम में प्रशंसक पूरी तरह से सदमे में थे।

segments.voice_english: And when England sealed the six to four victory, this became an unforgettable classic.
segments.image_query: England national football team celebration victory
segments.subtitle_english: And when England sealed the six to four victory, this became an unforgettable classic.
segments.voice_hindi: और जब इंग्लैंड ने छह-चार से जीत पक्की कर ली, तो यह एक अविस्मरणीय क्लासिक बन गया।

data.youtube_title: England vs France: 10 Goals ka Shocking Thriller! 😱
title_options: England vs France: 10 Goals ka Shocking Thriller! 😱
World Cup 2026 ka Sabse Crazy 6-4 Match! 🤯
England vs France: 10 Goals ka Insane Drama! 🔥
data.description: World Cup 2026 me England aur France ke beech 10 goals ka aisa insane drama hua jo kisi ne nahi socha tha! 😱 England ne France ki defensive mistakes par 6 goals thor diye, par France ne bhi 4 fast goals se jabardast fight back kiya. ⚽ Kya aapne aisa World Cup thriller pehle kabhi dekha hai? Comments me batao! 👇
